description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold yellow and black color scheme with a glossy finish. The shoe has a prominent ankle strap with a visible 'adidas' logo, and three black stripes on the side, characteristic of Adidas branding. The upper is constructed from synthetic leather with reinforced stitching, and the laces are yellow, matching the main color of the shoe. The midsole is gray with a slightly textured surface, and the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. The back of the shoe displays a red cross and the word 'THSN' in pink, adding a unique design element. The overall build suggests a sturdy, supportive shoe suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A glossy yellow and black high-top sneaker with an ankle strap, Adidas branding, and a sturdy rubber sole. Features include yellow laces, three black stripes, and a unique red cross detail on the heel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the yellow laces, tongue, and ankle strap with the 'adidas' logo clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the three black Adidas stripes, the ankle strap, and the gray midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the red cross and 'THSN' text on the heel, with the yellow and black color scheme wrapping around.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the stripes, strap, and overall shoe profile.
attribute_logo: Small rectangular 'adidas' logo on the ankle strap, white trefoil logo on the side, and three black stripes on the side panels.
